none.$description: No motion. Used as the reduced-motion target and the default transition delay.

instant.$description: Micro-feedback on small elements — hover, focus rings, toggles, small fades.

fast.$description: Quick transitions over short distances — dropdowns, popovers, exits.

base.$description: Default duration for most UI transitions.

slow.$description: Larger surfaces entering or leaving — modals, drawers, sheets.

slower.$description: Full-screen transitions and background dimming behind overlays.
